title: RF elements TPA-AMU-V3, TwistPort adapter for Mimosa B5x/B6x/C5x/C6x(LE)
description: The RF elements TPA-AMU-V3 is a TwistPort adapter designed for Mimosa B5x , B6x , C5x , C6x and C6x Lite Edition (LE) wireless APs and it is used to connect a TwistPort antenna to the unit itself . TwistPort adapters are equipped with a quick-lock system and you can easily switch between horizontal/vertical (H/V) and dual-slant polarization (45 °) configurations. Connecting and disconnecting the Mimosa unit to/from the TwistPort adapter is very simple and does not require any tools. Integration…
